name: Xiangqi
author: AGP (traditional Chinese Chess)
description: Xiangqi (Chinese Chess) on a 9x10 board. Generals confined to their palaces, elephants that cannot cross the river, lame horses, and cannons that must jump a screen to capture. Checkmate or stalemate the enemy general to win; the flying-general rule forbids the two generals from facing each other on an open file. Red moves first.
